title: Bound every call with timeout, retry, and cost ceilings
description: Each model call carries an explicit timeout, a bounded retry policy with backoff, and a token/cost ceiling that fails closed.
body: Use when adding or changing any code path that calls a model API. Do not issue a call with no timeout, and avoid retry loops that lack a cap or jittered backoff. Actions: set a per-call timeout; cap retries with exponential backoff and jitter; compute a max-token/max-cost ceiling and reject requests that would exceed it; distinguish retryable (429/5xx/timeout) from terminal (4xx) errors. Validation signals include a test that a hanging call aborts at the timeout and that the retry count and cost ceiling are honored. Risk boundary: an unbounded call or retry storm can exhaust budget or rate limits; treat its absence as a blocking finding.
